creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
https://mariadb.com/kb/en/mariadb/security/

I'd like to point out, based on the link to Oracle in bug #211248 and the above from MariaDB, they say that MariaDB is based off of MySQL 5.5 and is not affected by vulnerabilities in MySQL 5.6 or MySQL 5.7. Furthermore, all the MySQL 5.5 vulnerabilities have been fixed in the versions of the MariaDB ports that are currently in the ports tree. I think the vuxml entries for the MariaDB ports needs to be corrected as a result.
